summary: Iteration 14: Tested all new accounting hierarchy features. Fixed route conflict bug in /api/parties/grouped endpoint. All features working: Expenses page in nav, Manage Categories modal, Account Head dropdown in Add Ledger, Parent Ledger dropdown, filter by Account Head, P&L grouped by Direct/Indirect Income/Expense, Balance Sheet grouped by Current Asset/Fixed Asset/Liabilities/Capital.

bugs_fixed.issue: Route conflict: /api/parties/grouped was returning 404 because it was defined AFTER /api/parties/{party_id}, causing 'grouped' to be matched as a party_id
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved /api/parties/grouped route BEFORE /api/parties/{party_id} to ensure correct route matching

critical_code_review_comments: FastAPI route order matters: specific routes like /parties/grouped must be defined BEFORE parameterized routes like /parties/{party_id}
Custom expense categories are stored in localStorage (frontend-only), not persisted to backend
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test ledgers: TEST_DirectExpense_Rent, TEST_ParentLedger_5449db, TEST_ParentLedger_ba2bb2
context_for_next_testing_agent: Accounting hierarchy system fully implemented. Ledgers can have Account Head (category) like Current Asset, Fixed Asset, Direct Expense etc. Sub-ledger support via Parent Ledger. P&L shows ledgers grouped by Direct/Indirect Income/Expense. Balance Sheet shows ledgers grouped by Current Asset/Fixed Asset/Liabilities/Capital. Custom expense categories stored in localStorage.
